title: Bridge Essay: Effects of yoga on brain waves and structural activation: A review.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Breath and soul — pranayama, breath-brain coupling, respiratory-brain interaction, cardiorespiratory entrainment, vagal pathways of consciousness.

**Effects of yoga on brain waves and structural activation: Areview.** — Complement Ther Clin Pract. PMID: 25824030. DOI: 10.1016/j.ctcp.2015.02.002. Previous research has shown the vast mental and physical health benefits associated with yoga. Yoga practice can be divided into subcategories that include posture-holding exercise (asana), breathing (pranayama, Kriya), and meditation (Sahaj) practice. Studies measuring mental health outcomes have shown decreases in anxiety, and increases in cognitive performance after yoga interventions. Similar studies have also shown cognitive advantages amongst yoga practitioners versus non-practitioners. Th...
